title: potentilla aurea subvar. pusilla
intro: Potentilla aurea subvar. pusilla, also known as Dwarf Yellow Cinquefoil, is a low-growing, perennial plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and flavonoids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The herbal preparations of Dwarf Yellow Cinquefoil include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its health benefits.
